enrichment.short_description: CharlieHR is an HR platform that automates onboarding, time off, performance reviews and employee records for small UK businesses.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: CharlieHR: HR software for UK small businesses covering onboarding, time off, performance reviews, employee records and perks.

features.title: Onboarding
features.description: Automated collection of new-hire information before day one.

features.title: Time Off Management
features.description: Automated leave request and approval workflows.

features.title: Performance Reviews
features.description: Tools for team development and growth conversations.

features.title: Employee Engagement
features.description: Polls and engagement tracking for teams.

features.title: Perks & Benefits
features.description: Access to 30,000+ discounts and deals included in every subscription.

features.title: Document Storage
features.description: Centralized employee records and HR documentation.

features.title: Charlie Recruit (add-on)
features.description: Automated hiring workflows, interview scheduling and eSignature contracts.

features.title: Charlie Advice (add-on)
features.description: Dedicated HR advisor support with legal compliance checks.

pros: All-in-one HR admin platform purpose-built for small UK teams
Perks and discounts marketplace included in every plan
7-day free trial with no credit card required
ISO 27001 certified and GDPR compliant
cons: Focused on UK employment and compliance, not a global payroll or EOR solution
Recruiting and HR-advisor support are paid add-ons rather than included features
Per-employee price rises quickly as team-size bands increase

faqs.question: Does CharlieHR offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 7-day free trial is available and does not require a credit card.

faqs.question: What is included in every Charlie plan?
faqs.answer: Onboarding, time off, employee engagement, perks, employee records, performance reviews and key integrations.

faqs.question: Are recruiting and HR advisory services included?
faqs.answer: No, they are paid add-ons called Charlie Recruit and Charlie Advice.

faqs.question: Who is CharlieHR designed for?
faqs.answer: UK-based startups and small businesses, from teams of 1-4 employees up to 250+.

use_cases.title: Startup HR admin
use_cases.description: Centralizes onboarding, leave requests and employee records for early-stage UK startups.
use_cases.audience: Founders and office managers at small UK startups

use_cases.title: Employee perks and engagement
use_cases.description: Gives teams access to a marketplace of 30,000+ discounts alongside engagement polls.
use_cases.audience: HR and People teams at small UK companies

pricing_plans.price: From £20/month (1-4 employees) up to £735/month (250+ employees), tiered by team size

long_form_blocks.heading: What is CharlieHR?
paragraphs: CharlieHR is an HR management platform built for small UK businesses, handling onboarding, time off, performance reviews and employee records in one system.
The platform bundles a marketplace of employee perks and discounts into every subscription and offers paid add-ons for recruiting and dedicated HR advice.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who CharlieHR is for
paragraphs: CharlieHR targets UK-based startups and small companies, from teams of just 1-4 employees up to larger SMEs of 250+, typically run by founders or office managers rather than dedicated HR departments.

enrichment.short_description: Breathe (BreatheHR) is an HR platform for UK SMEs covering absence, leave, onboarding, performance management and e-learning.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Breathe (BreatheHR): HR software for UK SMEs with absence tracking, leave, onboarding, performance management and e-learning.

features.title: Holiday and leave management
features.description: Tracks holiday entitlement and requests.

features.title: Absence and sickness tracking
features.description: Records and reports on employee absence.

features.title: Onboarding workflows
features.description: Structured new-hire onboarding process.

features.title: Performance management
features.description: Tools for reviews and goal tracking.

features.title: E-learning platform
features.description: 100+ UK-specific training courses.

features.title: Rota and shift scheduling
features.description: Plans shifts and rotas for teams.

features.title: Document management
features.description: Centralized HR documents with e-signatures.

features.title: Xero payroll integration
features.description: Connects employee data to Xero payroll.

pros: Broad feature set (HR, e-learning, rotas, expenses) in one platform for SMEs
No long-term contract; commitment-free plans that can be cancelled anytime
Free trial without requiring a credit card
Purpose-built for UK compliance, including UK-specific e-learning content
cons: Acquired by ELMO Cloud HR & Payroll in 2020, so it now operates as part of a larger group
Designed for companies up to 250 employees, so not suited to larger enterprises
Public pricing details were not accessible on the pricing page at time of review

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a commitment-free trial is available without requiring a credit card.

faqs.question: What size of company is Breathe designed for?
faqs.answer: SMEs with 1-250 employees.

faqs.question: Does Breathe integrate with payroll?
faqs.answer: Yes, it integrates with Xero for payroll.

faqs.question: Who owns Breathe?
faqs.answer: Breathe was acquired by ELMO Cloud HR & Payroll in 2020.

use_cases.title: Absence and leave tracking
use_cases.description: Centralizes holiday requests, sickness tracking and approvals for SME HR teams.

use_cases.title: Employee training
use_cases.description: Delivers 100+ UK-specific e-learning courses alongside core HR records.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is BreatheHR?
paragraphs: Breathe (formerly marketed as BreatheHR) is an HR platform built for small and medium-sized UK businesses, combining leave management, absence tracking, onboarding and performance reviews.
The platform also includes an e-learning library of UK-specific courses, rota scheduling and Xero payroll integration, and has been part of the ELMO Cloud HR & Payroll group since 2020.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who BreatheHR is for
paragraphs: Breathe serves UK SMEs with up to 250 employees across sectors including charities, construction, education, healthcare and legal services.

name: Zenefits
skip_reason: Zenefits has been discontinued by its owner TriNet as of 2025; the standalone product can no longer be purchased, new signups are closed, and existing customers are being migrated to TriNet HR Plus or TriNet PEO. It is no longer an active, purchasable product to enrich.

enrichment.short_description: Namely is a human capital management (HCM) platform combining HR, payroll and benefits administration for midsized US companies.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Namely is an HCM platform for midsized companies, combining HR management, payroll and benefits administration with custom pricing.

features.title: Core HCM
features.description: HR management, payroll processing and time & attendance tracking.

features.title: Benefits administration
features.description: Manages employee benefits enrollment and eligibility.

features.title: Applicant tracking
features.description: Tracks candidates through the hiring process.

features.title: Performance management
features.description: Tools for employee reviews and goal tracking.

features.title: Compliance guidance
features.description: Support for HR compliance requirements.

features.title: Managed services
features.description: Optional outsourced HR, payroll and benefits administration.

features.title: Mobile app
features.description: Employee self-service access on mobile.

features.title: Reporting
features.description: Real-time workforce analytics and custom visualizations.

pros: Combines payroll, benefits and core HR into one HCM platform
Offers managed/outsourced service options in addition to self-service software
Serves multiple industries with tailored solution pages (finance, nonprofit, healthcare, retail, etc.)
cons: Pricing is not published; requires requesting a quote or demo
Website does not disclose company size or specific customer counts

faqs.question: What does Namely's pricing look like?
faqs.answer: Namely does not publish pricing; the site directs visitors to request a quote via "Get Pricing."

faqs.question: What company sizes does Namely target?
faqs.answer: Midsized companies.

faqs.question: Does Namely offer payroll?
faqs.answer: Yes, payroll processing is part of its core HCM offering.

use_cases.title: All-in-one HCM
use_cases.description: Runs HR, payroll and benefits administration from a single platform.

use_cases.title: Outsourced HR/payroll
use_cases.description: Namely's managed services let companies outsource HR, payroll and benefits administration.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Namely?
paragraphs: Namely is a human capital management (HCM) platform for midsized companies, unifying payroll, benefits administration and core HR into a single system.
Beyond self-service software, Namely also offers managed services where its team handles outsourced HR, payroll and benefits administration on a company's behalf.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Namely is for
paragraphs: Namely targets midsized organizations across industries such as finance, nonprofits, technology, manufacturing, construction, healthcare, hospitality, retail and professional services.

enrichment.short_description: Justworks is a PEO offering payroll, benefits, compliance and HR support for small businesses, priced per employee per month.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Justworks is a PEO offering payroll, benefits, compliance and HR support, with PEO Basic and Plus plans priced per employee per month.

features.title: Payments & payroll
features.description: Payroll processing and payments.

features.title: Compliance support
features.description: Helps businesses stay compliant with employment regulations.

features.title: HR support & consultation
features.description: Access to HR guidance and consultation.

features.title: Reporting tools
features.description: Reporting on payroll and workforce data.

features.title: Contractor & vendor payments
features.description: Manages payments to contractors and vendors.

features.title: Health insurance administration
features.description: Available on the PEO Plus plan, including HSA/FSA accounts.

features.title: 401(k) retirement plans
features.description: Retirement benefits included in PEO plans.

features.title: International contractor management
features.description: Add-on for paying contractors and hiring employees abroad.

pros: Transparent, published per-employee pricing for PEO plans
Bundles payroll, benefits, compliance and HR support under one PEO plan
Employee perks marketplace (e.g., fitness and wellness benefits) included
cons: PEO Plus plan (with health insurance) costs notably more per employee than Basic
International hiring is a separate, higher-cost add-on rather than included in core plans
Workers' compensation is a required inclusion, which may not suit every business structure

faqs.question: How much does Justworks cost?
faqs.answer: The PEO Basic plan is $79 per employee per month; PEO Plus, which adds health insurance benefits, costs $109 per employee per month.

faqs.question: Does Justworks support international employees?
faqs.answer: Yes, through an add-on for international contractor management and global employment.

faqs.question: Is there a payroll-only plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, Justworks offers a Payroll plan with a monthly base fee plus a per-employee charge.

use_cases.title: PEO for small business
use_cases.description: Bundles payroll, benefits, workers' comp and compliance into one PEO plan billed per employee.
use_cases.audience: Small business owners and operations leads

use_cases.title: Global contractor payments
use_cases.description: Adds international contractor management for companies hiring outside the US.
use_cases.audience: Companies with distributed or remote contractor teams

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Justworks?
paragraphs: Justworks is a Professional Employer Organization (PEO) that bundles payroll, benefits administration, compliance support and HR consultation into per-employee-per-month plans.

Its PEO Basic and PEO Plus tiers add services like health insurance, HSA/FSA accounts and wellness perks as pricing increases, and a separate Payroll-only plan is available for companies that don't need full PEO services.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Justworks is for
paragraphs: Justworks is aimed at small businesses that want to outsource payroll, benefits and HR compliance rather than manage them in-house, including companies that occasionally need to pay international contractors.

enrichment.short_description: Papaya Global is a workforce management platform offering Employer of Record, global payroll and contractor payments in 160+ countries.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Papaya Global is a workforce management platform for Employer of Record, global payroll and contractor payments across 160+ countries.

features.title: Employer of Record
features.description: Employs workers on a company's behalf in 160+ countries.

features.title: Global payroll
features.description: Payroll for companies with their own foreign entities.

features.title: Contractor payments
features.description: Manages and pays international contractors.

features.title: Own payments infrastructure
features.description: Cross-border disbursements running on Papaya's own payments system, supporting 130+ currencies.

features.title: Workforce OS / Payments OS / Contingent OS
features.description: Three-part product architecture covering employment, payments and contractor governance.

pros: Operates its own payments infrastructure rather than relying solely on third parties
Wide country coverage (160+ countries) for EOR and payroll
Offers tiered EOR pricing, including a premium tier with dedicated HR support
cons: EOR pricing starts significantly higher than several competitors, from $650/employee/month
Multi-product lineup (Workforce OS, Payments OS, Contingent OS) may require sales guidance to navigate

faqs.question: What does Papaya Global's EOR cost?
faqs.answer: Standard EOR pricing starts at $650/employee/month, with a premium tier at $770/employee/month.

faqs.question: Does Papaya Global support contractor payments?
faqs.answer: Yes, contractor management starts at $30/contractor/month.

faqs.question: How many countries does Papaya Global cover?
faqs.answer: 160+ countries for EOR, payroll and contractor services.

use_cases.title: Global EOR hiring
use_cases.description: Employs workers on a company's behalf across 160+ countries without setting up local entities.

use_cases.title: Global payroll consolidation
use_cases.description: Runs payroll for a company's own foreign entities from one platform.
use_cases.audience: Companies with existing international legal entities

features: Payroll for companies with their own entities

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Papaya Global?
paragraphs: Papaya Global is a workforce management platform that combines Employer of Record services, global payroll and contractor payments on its own payments infrastructure.

The company organizes its products into three systems: Workforce OS for employment and payroll, Payments OS for cross-border disbursements, and Contingent OS for contractor and vendor workforce management, covering 160+ countries.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Papaya Global is for
paragraphs: Papaya Global targets companies that need to employ or pay workers internationally, whether hiring through Papaya's EOR entities or running payroll through the company's own foreign legal entities.

enrichment.short_description: Oyster is an Employer of Record platform for hiring, paying and managing employees and contractors in 180+ countries without local entities.
enrichment.headquarters: San Francisco, California, United States (fully distributed team)
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Oyster is an EOR platform for compliant hiring, payroll and benefits across 180+ countries, plus contractor payments and a US PEO option.

features.title: Compliant onboarding
features.description: Onboards employees in as little as 48 hours across 180+ countries.

features.title: Multi-country payroll
features.description: Handles payroll in 120+ currencies.

features.title: Global Contractors
features.description: Instant contracts and payments for contractors in 180+ countries.

features.title: US PEO
features.description: Hire employees across US states through co-employment.

features.title: People Partner Services
features.description: White-glove, project-based HR advisory billed hourly.

features.title: Visa sponsorship
features.description: Supports talent mobility and visa sponsorship.

features.title: HRIS/ATS integrations
features.description: Connects with tools including Xero, Slack, HiBob, Personio, Ashby, BambooHR, Greenhouse and QuickBooks.

features.title: Misclassification analyzer
features.description: Flags contractor misclassification risk.

pros: Certified B Corporation
Broad country coverage (180+ countries) for EOR and contractor hiring
Integrates with multiple common HR, ATS and accounting tools
Discount programs for nonprofits, B-corps, refugees and startups
cons: EOR pricing ($699/employee/month) is a flat per-employee fee regardless of country, which can be costly for smaller teams
People Partner Services is billed hourly ($300/hour) on top of other plans
Company headquarters and size are not detailed on the official site

faqs.question: How much does Oyster's Employer of Record plan cost?
faqs.answer: $699 per employee per month, with annual discounts available.

faqs.question: Is there a free option?
faqs.answer: The Global Contractors plan is free for the first 30 days, then $29/contractor/month.

faqs.question: Does Oyster offer US-only hiring?
faqs.answer: Yes, through its US PEO plan at $114/employee/month.

use_cases.title: Global EOR hiring
use_cases.description: Employs full-time staff compliantly across 180+ countries without setting up local entities.

use_cases.title: Contractor payments
use_cases.description: Generates instant contracts and pays international contractors in 120+ currencies.
use_cases.audience: Companies hiring global freelancers or contractors

features: Hire in any US state via co-employment
Support for EOR and own entities

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Oyster?
paragraphs: Oyster is a global employment platform offering Employer of Record (EOR) services so companies can hire, pay and manage employees and contractors in 180+ countries without setting up local legal entities.
Beyond EOR, Oyster also offers a Global Contractors product, a US PEO plan for domestic hiring, and hourly People Partner Services for hands-on HR advisory.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Oyster is for
paragraphs: Oyster serves companies hiring internationally, from startups converting contractors to full-time employees to larger organizations needing visa sponsorship and multi-country payroll, and holds Certified B Corporation status.

enrichment.short_description: Multiplier is an Employer of Record platform for hiring, paying and managing employees and contractors globally at flat per-employee pricing.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Multiplier is an EOR and global payroll platform offering flat-rate hiring, contractor management and immigration support worldwide.

features.title: Employer of Record
features.description: Employs full-time staff globally without local entities.

features.title: Contractors (COR)
features.description: Onboards and pays contractors worldwide within minutes.

features.title: Global payroll
features.description: Manages multi-country payroll from one platform.

features.title: Immigration support
features.description: Visa processing and expert support across countries.

features.title: ESOP support
features.description: Supports Employee Stock Ownership Plans for global hires.

features.title: 24/5 local support
features.description: Local HR and legal support available 24/5.

pros: Flat-rate EOR pricing with no setup or offboarding fees
Fast onboarding, typically completed within 24-72 hours
ISO and SOC 2+3 certified security
Backed by 100+ owned entities across 150+ countries
cons: Global payroll and immigration services are custom-priced rather than published
Flat per-employee pricing may not reflect true cost differences between countries with very different statutory costs

faqs.question: How much does Multiplier's EOR plan cost?
faqs.answer: A flat $400/month per employee, with no setup or offboarding fees.

faqs.question: Does Multiplier support contractors?
faqs.answer: Yes, contractor management costs $40/contractor/month.

faqs.question: How fast is onboarding?
faqs.answer: Employee onboarding typically completes within 24-72 hours.

faqs.question: Where is Multiplier headquartered?
faqs.answer: Singapore.

use_cases.title: Global EOR hiring
use_cases.description: Employs full-time staff worldwide at a flat per-employee monthly rate.
use_cases.audience: Companies scaling international teams on a budget

use_cases.title: Contractor management
use_cases.description: Onboards and pays international contractors within minutes.
use_cases.audience: Companies working with global freelance talent

features: Contractor onboarding and payments in 120+ currencies

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Multiplier?
paragraphs: Multiplier is a global employment platform offering Employer of Record (EOR) services at a flat monthly rate per employee, letting companies hire full-time staff in 100+ countries without local entities.
The platform also covers contractor onboarding and payments, multi-country payroll, and immigration/visa support, and reports being backed by 100+ owned entities across 150+ countries.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Multiplier is for
paragraphs: Multiplier is aimed at companies that want predictable, flat-rate pricing for international hiring, including startups building distributed teams and businesses that need to onboard contractors quickly.

name: Velocity Global
skip_reason: Velocity Global has rebranded as 'Pebl' — velocityglobal.com now issues a 301 redirect to hellopebl.com, whose homepage states 'Velocity Global is now Pebl.' The product no longer operates under the name 'Velocity Global,' so this is a genuine name mismatch rather than a simple ownership change.

name: Omnipresent
skip_reason: omnipresent.com and www.omnipresent.com return 404 on the homepage, /pricing and /faq. Search results for the domain show page titles now branded as Deel (e.g., 'Pricing | ... | Deel', 'Hire Employees Globally ... | Deel'), indicating Omnipresent has been absorbed into Deel and is no longer reachable as an independent, live product to verify and enrich.
